privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: CarSpecio ("we") is the data controller for the personal data collected through this website. You can contact us at contacto@carspecio.com.
privacy.s2Body: We may collect the following personal data when you interact with our site:
privacy.s2Item1: Browsing data (browser type, pages visited, time spent).
privacy.s2Item4: Data provided voluntarily (email when subscribing to the newsletter).
privacy.s3Body: We process your data for the following purposes:
privacy.s3Item1: Improve the browsing experience and personalize content.
privacy.s3Item2: Analyze traffic and site performance using web analytics tools.
privacy.s3Item3: Send newsletters and communications about automotive news (only if you subscribe).
privacy.s3Item4: Ensure site security and prevent fraudulent activities.
privacy.s4Body: The legal basis for processing your data is your consent, which you can withdraw at any time. Data processing for analytical purposes is carried out only after your express acceptance via the cookie banner.
privacy.s5Body: We use the following types of cookies:
privacy.s5Item1: Technical cookies (essential): Necessary for the basic functioning of the site (language preference, dark/light mode). Do not require consent.
privacy.s5Item2: Analytical cookies: Google Analytics or similar, to measure traffic and user behavior. Only activated after your consent.
privacy.s5Item3: Social media cookies: Allow sharing content on social platforms. Only activated after your consent.
privacy.s6Body: Browsing data is retained for a maximum of 24 months. Data provided for the newsletter is retained until you request to unsubscribe.
privacy.s7Body: Your data may be processed by the following service providers, under data processing agreements:
privacy.s7Body2: We will not transfer your data to third parties for commercial purposes without your express consent.
privacy.s8Body: Under the GDPR (Regulation (EU) 2016/679) and LOPDGDD (Organic Law 3/2018), you have the right to:
privacy.s8Item3: Erasure of your data ("right to be forgotten").
privacy.s8Item7: Withdrawal of consent at any time.
privacy.s8Body2: To exercise these rights, send an email to contacto@carspecio.com.
privacy.s9Body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction. These measures include HTTPS encryption, access control and periodic audits.
privacy.s10Body: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy to adapt to legislative or jurisprudential developments. We recommend reviewing this page periodically to stay informed of changes.
privacy.s11Body: If you have any questions about our privacy policy or the processing of your data, you can contact us at contacto@carspecio.com.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPolicy.s1Body: Cookies are small text files that a website sends to the user's browser and stores on their device. They allow the site to remember information about the visit, such as language preferences or browsing behavior, to improve the user experience.
cookiesPolicy.s2Body: CarSpecio uses the following categories of cookies:
cookiesPolicy.s2Item1: Necessary cookies (technical): Essential for the basic functioning of the site. They include language preferences, dark/light mode and session configuration. Do not require prior consent.
cookiesPolicy.s2Item2: Functional cookies: Enable enhanced features, such as content personalization and integration of interactive tools. Only activated after your consent.
cookiesPolicy.s2Item3: Analytical cookies: Collect anonymous information about how visitors use the site (pages visited, time spent, traffic source). We use tools like Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity. Only activated after your consent.
cookiesPolicy.s2Item4: Marketing/advertising cookies: Used to display relevant ads and measure advertising campaign performance (Google Ads). Only activated after your consent.
cookiesPolicy.s4Body: When you visit CarSpecio for the first time, a cookie banner is shown allowing you to accept or reject the use of non-essential cookies. You can change your decision at any time by clicking the "Cookies" link in the footer.
cookiesPolicy.s4Body2: Your consent is stored locally in your browser and is respected on subsequent visits.
cookiesPolicy.s5Body: CarSpecio may use third-party services that set their own cookies:
cookiesPolicy.s5Item1: Google Analytics / Google Tag Manager: Traffic and user behavior analysis.
cookiesPolicy.s5Item2: Microsoft Clarity: Heatmaps and session recordings for usability analysis.
cookiesPolicy.s5Body2: Each third party manages their own cookies according to their privacy policies. We recommend reviewing each provider's policies for more information.
cookiesPolicy.s6Body: You can disable or delete cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling necessary cookies may affect the functioning of the site.
cookiesPolicy.s7Body: We reserve the right to modify this cookie policy to adapt to legislative changes or new services used by the site. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.
cookiesPolicy.s8Body: If you have any questions about our cookie policy, you can contact us at contacto@carspecio.com.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.s1Body: By accessing and using CarSpecio ("the site"), you accept these terms and conditions of use. If you do not agree with any of these terms, please do not use the site.
termsOfService.s2Body: CarSpecio is a platform for car analysis, comparisons and reviews. The site provides technical information, expert opinions and tools to help users choose vehicles. We do not sell cars or intermediate in purchase-sale transactions.
termsOfService.s3Body: The user agrees to use the site in accordance with the law and these terms. It is prohibited to:
termsOfService.s3Item1: Use the site for illegal or fraudulent activities.
termsOfService.s3Item2: Attempt to access restricted areas or internal systems of the site.
termsOfService.s3Item3: Reproduce, copy or distribute content without express authorization.
termsOfService.s3Item4: Use automated tools (bots, scrapers) to extract data massively without authorization.
termsOfService.s3Item5: Introduce viruses, malware or malicious code into the site.
termsOfService.s4Body: All content on CarSpecio (texts, images, graphics, designs, code, trademarks and logos) is protected by intellectual property rights. Total or partial reproduction without express written authorization is prohibited.
termsOfService.s4Body2: The trademarks and logos of car manufacturers referenced on the site belong to their respective owners and are used for informational purposes only.
termsOfService.s5Body: We strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information. However, we do not guarantee that technical information, prices or vehicle specifications are error-free. We recommend verifying data with the manufacturer or official dealer before making a purchase decision.
termsOfService.s6Body: The site may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy policies of such sites. Accessing them is at your own responsibility.
termsOfService.s7Body: CarSpecio may display third-party advertising (Google AdSense) and use analytics tools (Google Analytics, Microsoft Clarity). These services may collect anonymous data about your browsing, always in accordance with your consent and our cookie policy.
termsOfService.s8Body: CarSpecio is not liable for direct or indirect damages that may arise from the use or inability to use the site, including data loss, loss of profit or consequential damages. The site is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.
termsOfService.s9Body: We reserve the right to modify, suspend or discontinue any part of the site at any time, without prior notice. Likewise, we may update content and features according to project needs.
termsOfService.s10Body: We may update these terms of service at any time. We recommend reviewing this page periodically to stay informed of changes. Continued use of the site after modifications implies acceptance of the updated terms.
termsOfService.s11Body: These terms are governed by Spanish and European legislation. Any dispute will be resolved before the competent courts of Spain, unless applicable law establishes another jurisdiction.
termsOfService.s12Body: If you have any questions about these terms of service, you can contact us at contacto@carspecio.com.

hero.title: Decide like an informed premium buyer.
hero.subtitle: Simulate real costs, compare prices, measure depreciation and discover quick rankings in a clearer, more visual environment designed for premium purchases in Spain.

panel.step1Span: start with mileage, fuel and annual depreciation.
panel.step2Span: quickly validate the real price difference between models.
panel.step3Span: close the decision with depreciation and ranking by priority.
panel.highlightText: Total annual cost is usually the metric that changes the purchase.

stats.item1Span: estimate the real impact before buying
stats.item4Span: filter by price, power or reliability

overview.title: Available tools
overview.subtitle: A decision center with clearer blocks, contextual aids and direct access to each analysis.
overview.card1Text: Combines fuel, insurance, maintenance and depreciation to see the real cost of ownership.
overview.card2Text: Compare two models and open the full comparison when you find a relevant difference.
overview.card3Text: Visualize how the car's value drops over the years and detect less favorable scenarios.
overview.card4Text: Gets actionable lists by price, power and reliability to speed up the final selection.

benefits.title: Why use these tools
benefits.subtitle: Less intuition, more clarity. Each module is designed to help you justify a premium purchase with more confidence.
benefits.card1Text: Ordered results to quickly detect where cost spikes and which is the most balanced option.
benefits.card2Text: Adjust mileage, fuel and annual rate to bring the scenario closer to your real usage in Spain.
benefits.card3Text: Go from initial curiosity to a tangible recommendation with less friction and better visual hierarchy.

calc.title: Real annual cost calculator
calc.subtitle: Start here if you want to know how much the purchase changes when you look at total ownership, not just entry price.

calc.kmHint: Ideal to distinguish occasional urban use from intensive road use.
calc.fuelHint: Allows you to stress the scenario with more conservative or more demanding prices.
calc.deprHint: Depreciation is usually the factor that most alters purchase profitability.
calc.resultFuelHint: Consumption impact based on your mileage.
calc.resultInsuranceHint: Orientative annual reference for the segment.

price.panelSubtitle: A direct summary to detect which option fits better in your purchase range.

rank.subtitle: Activate the criterion that matters most to you and generate a short top to guide the final decision.
rank.panelSubtitle: Price, power or reliability: choose a criterion and adjust the number of results.

contact.pageDescription: Contact CarSpecio for inquiries, advertising, suggestions or support. Fast response guaranteed.
contact.heroSubtitle: Write to us directly. We respond in less than 24 hours with complete and personalized information.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and we will get in touch with you as soon as possible.
contact.privacyConsent: I accept the privacy policy and data processing *
contact.infoSubtitle: Multiple ways to reach our team.
contact.locationNote: CarSpecio headquarters - visit us on social media
contact.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions.
contact.faq1Q: How long does CarSpecio take to respond?
contact.faq1A: We respond to all messages in less than 24 hours. If it's urgent, call us directly at the phone number shown above.
contact.faq2Q: Can I request a custom car review?
contact.faq2A: Yes. Send us a message indicating the model you're interested in and our team will evaluate the possibility of doing an exclusive analysis for you.
contact.faq3Q: Does CarSpecio accept advertising or collaborations?
contact.faq3A: Of course. If you are a brand or have a collaboration proposal, select "Business proposal" in the form subject.
contact.faq4Q: How can I report an error or give suggestions?
contact.faq4A: Use the form with the subject "Review feedback" or "General inquiry" and tell us what to improve. Your feedback helps us grow.
contact.faq5A: No. CarSpecio is an analysis and comparison platform. We don't sell vehicles, but we help you choose the best one.
contact.faq6A: Yes. We use SSL encryption and comply with GDPR. Your data is only used to respond to your inquiry and is never shared with third parties.
contact.successMessage: ✓ Message sent successfully. We will contact you shortly.
